It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). StructureDefinition​.differential​.element[3]​.type[0]​.profile[0] (l1​/c211898)warningThere are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/patient-religion'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '5.3.0', found versions: 4.0.1 (from hl7.fhir.r4.core#4.0.1), 5.3.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.3.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/patient-religion' to 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/patient-religion|5.3.0' TYPE_SPECIFIC_CHECKS_DT_CANONICAL_MULTIPLE_POSSIBLE_VERSIONSStructureDefinition

TYPE_SPECIFIC_CHECKS_DT_CANONICAL_MULTIPLE_POSSIBLE_VERSIONS

fsh-generated/resources/StructureDefinition-ph-core-patient.jsonThere are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/patient-nationality'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '5.3.0', found versions: 4.0.1 (from hl7.fhir.r4.core#4.0.1), 5.3.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.3.0).
